name: FP_Navigation
summary: First-person ← → arrow key customisable navigation for LFS viewport. Includes 7 saved view slots with read/write of settings.
description: View navigation as First-Person with customisable floor (eye wont go below this set level).  Plugin  has eye/target XYZ display & allows 7 customisable view slots for your favoutite view angles: works in both viewer & Training modes. Settings persist on close so can be used in multiple projects.
author: Brian Davis (bb6)
